brief: Randolph Mantooth, star of 'Emergency!', dies at 80; Trump administration rolls back wildlife protections and escalates media pressure; new research explores visual analytics for missing data and crime linkage.
news_summary: Randolph Mantooth, who played firefighter-paramedic John Gage, has died. The Trump administration narrowed the Endangered Species Act and subpoenaed Times journalists, while a Canada-U.S. bridge deal was finalized and a Spanish wildfire killed at least 12.
papers_summary: Papers introduce ImputeViz for diagnosing missing data, study AI use in crime linkage analysis, and present a visual analytics system for traditional Chinese paintings.

en.brief: Randolph Mantooth, star of 'Emergency!', dies at 80; Trump administration rolls back wildlife protections and escalates media pressure; new research explores visual analytics for missing data and crime linkage.
en.news_summary: Randolph Mantooth, who played firefighter-paramedic John Gage, has died. The Trump administration narrowed the Endangered Species Act and subpoenaed Times journalists, while a Canada-U.S. bridge deal was finalized and a Spanish wildfire killed at least 12.
en.papers_summary: Papers introduce ImputeViz for diagnosing missing data, study AI use in crime linkage analysis, and present a visual analytics system for traditional Chinese paintings.

zh.brief: 今日新闻聚焦德国华人跨国性侵案、新加坡夫妇收养涉人口贩运男婴案以及母亲长期虐待伪装疾病的案例。研究方面，多篇论文探讨可视化分析、AI犯罪关联及脑机接口等领域。
zh.news_summary: 德国宣判'老司机驾校'跨国性侵案核心成员，新加坡夫妇收养男婴疑涉人口贩运，另有一名女子自幼被母亲强迫接受不必要医疗，实为长期虐待。
zh.papers_summary: 多篇计算机科学论文涉及缺失数据可视化诊断、AI在犯罪关联中的工业应用、以及中国脑机接口临床试验的现状分析。

todays_image.caption: The "HIBERNIA" fire engine plate and Randolph Mantooth's iconic role as a firefighter in 'Emergency!' both symbolize the enduring legacy of the men and machines that serve on the front lines of emergency response.
todays_image.title: Fire Engine Plate, "HIBERNIA"
